scene.message: Toro: U... ugh...... why is it{nl} always me this happens to...{waitkey}{ret}
Got 2 "Mirror Shards"!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Right then, let's head{nl} for the tower before long.{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Don't you feel like{nl} it's gotten a bit warmer?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: It's frozen over even{nl} inside the school building!{waitkey}{clearbox}What is that monster doing!!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Toro... is he okay~?{waitkey}Ah, no, it's not like I'm{nl} worried about him.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Let's hurry and get{nl} out.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: He's grown, in his own{nl} way, it seems.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: In a state like this,{nl} food is precious too.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Let's hurry to the{nl} floor above.{waitkey}{ret}
